q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is jinja2.Template(content).render() which is pure in-memory string processing, no network I/O, shell execution, or irreversible side effects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The XSS vulnerability (unescaped user input in HTML) is directly observable in the returned string content.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' and returns.exprs contains 'Template(content).render()', the rendered string is directly returned.
